im applab manager for the game and i played it and its very fun and has good graphics

You get flung to literally every single wall imaginable. Same with free roam. Even worse. It changes! Just wanted to leave this review for the devs to see if they didnt already somehow see this. Oh and also you can crawl on walls like spiderman. Very sigma game!

While you might play this game and say “ WELL ITS BUGGY AND THE MOVEMENT SUCKS!”. The owner of this game “Hydra” has posted multiple “sneak peeks” and dev logs in his discord server that make this game look and sound ABSOLUTELY FIRE!!!🔥🔥 The AMAZING monster designs, the items, the game modes , everything looks ABSOLUTELY SICK!!! The creative movement is meant to replicate the weight of your character and has actual thought put into it instead of the copy and paste gorilla tag movement that most fan games use. While yes the game is extremely buggy at the moment and there is no player model, all this WILL in fact be added in a later update. While you don’t have to download this game right now. TRUST ME this game will blow up and eventually go down as one of the best gorilla tag fangame horror games in HISTORY!! If you want to see all these dev logs i’m talking about join the F.E.A.R VR discord with this link 👉  https://discord.gg/s8ApvqQZ7S
I know this game just came out so I would expect bugs but over all the game seems perfectly fine to me the music is great the community is too

I know the owner said that its in complete and theres so many bugs, but after i saw all the teasers he posted in the discord server (discord.gg/fearvr) i couldnt wait for the game too release. this game is gonna be AWESOME
It may be buggy but on the discord it looks like the Devs put so much work into it and it looks so fun and realistic 😁 hope to play properly soon!
